title: santalum freycinetianum
intro: Santalum freycinetianum, also known as the Norfolk Island cedar or red sandalwood, is a plant species that belongs to the sandalwood family. The plant is native to Norfolk Island and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Santalum freycinetianum include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, which can be used in aromatherapy, and dried leaves, which can be made into teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
